mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, shipping_name, shipping_phone, shipping_address, total_price, payment, payment_type, payment_trade_no, status, payment_time, send_time, end_time, close_time, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (order_no, user_id, shipping_name, shipping_phone, shipping_address, total_price, payment, payment_type, payment_trade_no, status, payment_time, send_time, end_time, close_time, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{shippingName}, #{shippingPhone}, #{shippingAddress}, #{totalPrice}, #{payment}, #{paymentType}, #{paymentTradeNo}, #{status}, #{paymentTime}, #{sendTime}, #{endTime}, #{closeTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
, payment_time = NOW()
, send_time = NOW()
, end_time = NOW()
, close_time = NOW()
WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE `order` SET payment = #{payment}, payment_trade_no = #{paymentTradeNo}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `order` WHERE create_time >= CURDATE()
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(payment), 0) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
